Building ERP solutions that just work.

I turn complex business requirements into clean, maintainable Odoo modules — from custom workflows and reports to robust third-party integrations. My focus is automation that removes friction and gives teams back their time.

I'm currently open to freelance and full-time opportunities, and I love collaborating on ambitious ideas.
